shipping.standard: Free standard shipping on orders over $25. Delivery in 5-7 business days.
shipping.express: Express shipping ($9.99) delivers in 2-3 business days.
shipping.international: International shipping available to 40+ countries. Rates calculated at checkout.

returns.window: 30 days from delivery for unused items in original packaging.
returns.process: Initiate a return in chat or your account. Print the prepaid label and drop off at any carrier location.
returns.refund_timing: Refunds process within 5-7 business days after we receive the return.

password_reset.instructions: Go to bookly.com/reset, enter your email, and click the link we send. Links expire in 1 hour.
password_reset.support_escalation: If you don't receive the email within 10 minutes, check spam or contact support with your account email.
